productName: SMC - Infused Joint Pack - Indica - Cookies & Cream - 5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Cookies & Cream flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of vanilla, nutty, and chestnut, with a versatile, anytime balance. A little goes a long way.
